data.name: Cafe Rhythm
data.detailed_description:
Welcome to Cafe Rhythm: Where Every Cup Tells a Story, and Every Beat Warms the Heart.

Step into the world of Cafe Rhythm, a unique visual novel experience that blends the art of coffee brewing, captivating conversation, and evocative rhythms. In this small, warm, and character-filled cafe, you are not just a barista you are a listener, a taste diviner, and the key that might unlock the hearts of the unique patrons who walk into your shop.

More Than Just Coffee: A Meaningful Encounter

Your tranquil life as a cafe owner is suddenly filled with a cast of charming parody characters, each with their own distinct personality, background, and secrets. Whether it's a tsundere hiding their feelings behind complaints, a confident individual trying to forget the past, or a cheerful soul concealing inner wounds, it is your task to understand them.

  • Choose and Understand Your Customer: Of the many faces that visit, who will you serve today? Observe their body language, tone of voice, and subtle cues. Every interaction is an opportunity.

  • The Art of Conversation: Your dialogue choices are more than just words; they are tools for building relationships. Will you be a patient listener, a charming flirt, or someone who offers a challenge? Every correct response will increase the Love Meter, reveal deeper layers of the story, and gradually bring you closer to more intimate moments.

Brew Time! The Art of Crafting the Perfect Drink

Before the conversation flows deeper, showcase your expertise. Each customer has unique tastes and moods, and the right drink can break down their defenses.

  • Enter the Brewing Mini-Game: Step behind the counter and into a challenging mini-game phase. Shelves are stocked with select coffee beans, exotic syrups, spices, and special equipment for you to use.

  • Combination and Creativity: Follow basic recipes, but don't be afraid to trust your instincts! Combine ingredients from your stock do they need a strong shot of espresso, or perhaps a soothing herbal tea? Precise proportions and sequence are key.

  • Customer Satisfaction is Everything: A perfect drink will not only quench their thirst but also pave the way for more personal conversation and significantly boost the Love Meter.

Playful & Alluring: The Unforgettable Rhythm of Passion

When the bond and the Love Meter have peaked, get ready to enter a completely new dimension of the game. Unlock a deeper, more immersive experience with the Dynamic NSFW Rhythm Mode.

  • A Symphony for the Senses: This mode is a celebration where every element blends perfectly. Stunning visuals, alluring music, and soft, sensual moans sync harmoniously with every beat.

  • Follow the Rhythm of the Heart: Concentrate, for here, rhythm is everything. Follow the on-screen patterns with precise taps. Each successful tap not only advances the game but also deepens your intimate connection with the character, carrying you and your partner to the peak of shared pleasure.

  • A Personal and Provocative Experience: This is your reward for building the relationship. Feel the chemistry peak in a symphony of visual and audio designed to make you truly lose yourself in the heat of the moment.

This Cafe is Your Stage, and Love Stories Await to be Brewed.

Cafe Rhythm is more than just a game; it's an escape into a world where taste, words, and rhythm converge. Every customer is a story waiting to be unfolded. Every cup is an expression of feeling. And every beat is a step towards an unforgettable connection.

Prepare to sharpen your senses, hone your instincts, and dance to the rhythm of the heart. Cafe Rhythm awaits your arrival.

data.short_description: Cafe Rhythm: A unique visual novel where you brew coffee and build relationships with special customers. Choose dialogues wisely, create perfect drinks, and unlock steamy NSFW rhythm mode as bonds heat up.
data.supported_languages:
日文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 / AMD Ryzen 3
  • 記憶體: 4 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1050 / AMD Radeon RX 580
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 / AMD Ryzen 5 or Large
  • 記憶體: 8 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1650 / AMD Radeon RX 6400 or Large
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
